allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./apps/server/node_modules/express/package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({main: p.main, exports: p.exports, types: p.types}, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./apps/server/node_modules/@types/express/package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({main: p.main, exports: p.exports, types: p.types, version: p.version}, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: d[k] for k in ['name','version','main'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")
